mapper.select: SELECT IF(sender_id = #{userId}, receiver_id, sender_id) AS targetUserId, MAX(create_time) AS lastMessageTime, SUM(CASE WHEN receiver_id = #{userId} AND status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unreadCount FROM chat_messages WHERE sender_id = #{userId} OR receiver_id = #{userId} GROUP BY targetUserId ORDER BY lastMessageTime DESC
SELECT * FROM chat_messages WHERE (sender_id = #{userId} AND receiver_id = #{targetUserId}) OR (sender_id = #{targetUserId} AND receiver_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
